title: dactylorhiza incarnata f. brevibracteata
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata f. brevibracteata is a rare variety of orchid, commonly known as the small-bracted marsh orchid, a terrestrial orchid species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata f. brevibracteata include its ability to improve circulation, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional.
